system.specialQuality: keen night vision and sense of smell
system.moves:
- Move into position, silently and unseen
- Pounce on prey, dragging them down (forceful)
- Bite down and rake (messy)

They don’t usually hunt people. But when game is scarce, or some fool provokes them, they sometimes get a taste for human blood. Even then, they mostly leave groups alone, waiting for someone to fall behind or wander off. Mostly.
